backend/main.mo: Actor exposing a public query that returns the hardcoded published version string.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping features to involved files, components, tests, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries describing the purpose of various frontend files and components.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind-based styles defining OKLCH color variables, dark theme overrides, and base element styling.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point that preloads two critical images and mounts the React app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Wraps the landing page in an error boundary for runtime resilience.
frontend/src/components/deployment/Deplo: Banner component that validates a deployment domain and displays success or error states.
frontend/src/components/landing/__tests_: Empty test file placeholder for SwipeCarouselSection.
frontend/src/components/landing/AppSecti: Empty placeholder file for the App showcase section.
frontend/src/components/landing/assets.t: Exports arrays of carousel and transformation image assets with dev‑time validation checks.
frontend/src/components/landing/ClosingS: Renders the closing section with headline, subheadline, description, and the transformations carousel.
frontend/src/components/landing/FaqSecti: FAQ section rendering collapsible accordion items from tbnCopy content.
frontend/src/components/landing/FooterNa: Footer with brand info, quick links, attribution, and draft/backend version indicators.
frontend/src/components/landing/HeaderNa: Sticky header that displays the TBN logo and scrolls smoothly to the hero section on click.
frontend/src/components/landing/HeroSect: Hero section containing problem, truth, headline, dashboard image in a premium frame, and tagline using tbnCopy content.
frontend/src/components/landing/MediaFra: Image wrapper with loading, error handling, and retry logic using an auto and manual cache‑busting reload.
frontend/src/components/landing/SwipeCar: Swipeable, auto‑advancing carousel for feature slides with mouse and touch drag controls.
Simple logo component rendering a static image with size presets.
frontend/src/components/landing/Transfor: Swipeable, auto‑advancing carousel showing transformation images with drag controls.
frontend/src/components/landing/TrustedB: Static section displaying testimonials text and value cards from copy content.
frontend/src/components/landing/WhoForSe: Section listing target‑audience checklist and supporting text from copy content.
frontend/src/components/runtime/AppError: React error boundary that displays a fallback UI and reload option on runtime errors.
frontend/src/constants/appVersion.ts: Exports a constant label representing the current app version.
frontend/src/content/tbnCopy.ts: Contains structured marketing copy and carousel content for the landing page.
frontend/src/deployment/domain.ts: Exports the deployment domain slug used as the canonical identifier.
frontend/src/deployment/validateDomain.t: Provides functions to validate deployment domain slugs and return rule messages.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor based on Internet Identity, refreshing queries on identity change.
frontend/src/hooks/useAutoAdvanceCarouse: Implements auto-advancing carousel logic with pause, resume, and manual navigation.
Returns local app version and optionally fetches the backend published version for comparison.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity auth context, login handling, identity loading, and state management.
frontend/src/hooks/useLandingImagePreloa: Preloads landing page images with priority handling to improve perceived performance.
frontend/src/hooks/useMeasuredElementHei: Measures an element’s rendered height using ResizeObserver and returns a ref and height.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Empty placeholder file indicating no backend queries are used for the landing page.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines global Tailwind styles, theme variables, and custom component frames for the UI.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with React Query and Internet Identity providers.
frontend/src/pages/TbnLandingPage.tsx: Landing page component assembling sections and preloading images for optimized loading.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending theme colors, layout, animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project metadata describing existing features, known issues with image loading, and pending feature requests for preload and optimization.
